lines.lyric_translation: One two three four

lines.lyric_translation: Left and right / Left and right

lines.lyric_hangul: Seventeen, ha
lines.lyric_translation: Seventeen ha

lines.lyric: Itji maraya hae chulbalseone seol ttae
lines.lyric_hangul: 잊지 말아야 해 출발선에 설 때
lines.lyric_translation: Don’t forget when you’re at the starting line

lines.lyric_hangul: 두 눈 부릅뜨고 고갤 들어 (come on!)
lines.lyric_translation: Keep your eyes wide open and your chin up / Come on!

lines.lyric_hangul: 무릎 꿇고서 추진력을 얻고 나면
lines.lyric_translation: After you get on your knees and gain momentum

lines.lyric_hangul: 제일 먼저, baby, 앞서갈래 (come on!)
lines.lyric_translation: Baby wanna go ahead first / Come on!

lines.lyric_hangul: 친구들 불러, I'ma celebrate
lines.lyric_translation: Call all our friends I’ma celebrate

lines.lyric: Amudo mot mallyeo We party today
lines.lyric_hangul: 아무도 못 말려, we party today
lines.lyric_translation: No one can stop us We party today

lines.lyric_hangul: 클라이맥스 달려 꼬리를 휘날려 또
lines.lyric_translation: Run toward the climax swinging your tail again

lines.lyric_hangul: 알잖아 버펄로 (oh)
lines.lyric_translation: You know, like a buffalo

lines.lyric_hangul: 레드 카펫 위를 뛰어
lines.lyric_translation: Run on the red carpet

lines.lyric_hangul: 내일은 잘 나갈 거야 더
lines.lyric_translation: You’ll be better off tomorrow

lines.lyric_hangul: 하물며 대기권을
lines.lyric_translation: Pierce the atmosphere

lines.lyric_hangul: 뚫어, 뚫어, 뚫어, 뚫어
lines.lyric_translation: Go go go go

lines.lyric_hangul: 웃어봐 더, 하하하하
lines.lyric_translation: Laugh louder hahahaha

lines.lyric_hangul: 스무 번 더, 하하하하
lines.lyric_translation: Twenty more times hahahaha

lines.lyric_hangul: 이것은 결승선을 넘을 때 세리머니 시원하게 (yeah, it goes like)
lines.lyric_translation: Crossing the finish line with a ceremony / Exhilarating Yeh it goes like

lines.lyric_translation: Left and right / Left and right

lines.lyric_translation: When you’re feeling good with no worries

lines.lyric_hangul: 더, 더 확실하게, follow me (yeah, it goes like)
lines.lyric_translation: More more confidently Follow me / Yeh it goes like

lines.lyric_translation: I run up I run up

lines.lyric_translation: I run up I run up / Don’t listen to anyone else

parts.lyric: I run up I run up

lines.lyric_hangul: 딴말을 떠들어 떠들어
lines.lyric_translation: They talk away talk talk

lines.lyric_hangul: 어쩌고저쩌고 시끄러워 쉿 해
lines.lyric_translation: Whatever whatever be quiet Shh

lines.lyric_hangul: 우리에게 필요한 건
lines.lyric_translation: What we need

lines.lyric_hangul: 달콤한 내일이잖아
lines.lyric_translation: Is a sweet tomorrow

lines.lyric_hangul: 헹가래 하늘 향해
lines.lyric_translation: Toss it up toward the sky

lines.lyric_hangul: 위로, 위로, 위로, 위로
lines.lyric_translation: Up up up up

lines.lyric_hangul: 달리고, 달리고, 달려봐도
lines.lyric_translation: Even if we run run run

lines.lyric_hangul: 도대체 언제 앞지르냐고?
lines.lyric_translation: When can we get ahead

lines.lyric_hangul: 달리는 것만으로도 충분하다고, yeah, yeah, yeah
lines.lyric_translation: Running itself is tough enough Yeh

lines.lyric_hangul: 그럼 뭐 어쩌라고?
lines.lyric_translation: Then what should we do

lines.lyric_hangul: 안 뛰는 것도 방법이라고
lines.lyric_translation: Not running is an answer too

lines.lyric_hangul: 아무렴 어때? Yeah, yeah
lines.lyric_translation: Who cares what we do Yeh yeh
